THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ANGELICA HERNANDEZ, JUAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 ELLIS ST. #402, S.F. $1,125.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,125.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-16-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 9AM. THE SUM OF $1,125- IS ONLY AGAINST MS MENDOZA. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. NO OTHER PERSONS HAVE RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. UPON COMPLIANCE PLTF SHALL PAY MS MENDOZA $375- AND JUDGMENT DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL. ALL CLAIMS WAIVED. PLTF SHALL GIVE NEUTRAL RECOMM TO DEFT.
